name: Fast.io Agentic Workspace
description: Cloud storage platform built for agentic teams. Provides shared workspaces where AI agents and humans collaborate, with semantic search, RAG, MCP support, and agent-to-human handoff capabilities. Modern alternative to Box and Google Drive.
capabilities: Shared project workspaces for agents and humans
pricing: 50GB free tier with credits; $10-40/mo plans; enterprise licensing
notes: Built by MediaFire. Explicitly designed for agent-human collaboration. 14 built-in MCP tools. Features 10,000 AI credits/month on free tier. Activity logged in plain English for agent auditing. Comparable to Dropbox but agent-optimized.
